item.title: Severe winter storm live updates: 'The worst is yet to come,' NY Gov. Hochul says
item.description: Blizzard conditions are forecast for much of the Northeast.

item.title: DHS reverses decision to suspend TSA PreCheck and Global Entry due to shutdown
item.description: The reversal came in the wake of criticism by elected leaders and travelers.

item.title: WATCH: Man shot, killed by Secret Service, local deputy at Mar-a-Lago, agency says
item.description: A man who "appeared" to be armed was shot and killed by Secret Service agents after "unauthorized entry into the secure perimeter at Mar-a-Lago," the ...

item.title: WATCH: Gen Z is hitting life milestone later, experts say
item.description: Jeffrey Jensen Arnett, professor of psychology at Clark University, explains the new stage of emerging adulthood.

item.title: Russia targets Ukraine with 345 drones and missiles, Zelenskyy says
item.description: "Russia will not stop," said Yulia Svyrydenko, the Ukrainian prime minister.
